notes: One entry per shipped, consumer-repo-observable karta capability: {id, karta_version, ship_date, detection:{kind: grep|jq|ref, pattern, path}, durable} — or an explicit {version, observable: false} sentinel for a release that shipped no new repo-observable capability.
Coverage floor: every released version from 1.8.0 through 2.22.0 carries an entry or a sentinel, enumerated from the .claude-plugin/plugin.json version-transition commits (git log -G).

Era capabilities that shipped before the 1.8.0 coverage floor (debt markers, the smoke oracle type, the accept/failure path, failed-ref presence) carry their true first released version (1.0.0) and that version-transition commit's committer date; attributing them to 1.8.0 would forge their ship dates. The plan-time seed expectations name these features, so they are entries, not omissions.

ship_date = committer date of the plugin.json version-transition commit for that version. Declared deviation from card step 2: pre-1.13.0 bumps predate the chore(release) subject convention, so the transition commit — not a chore(release) grep — is the date source for every version.

detection kinds: grep = tracked-content substring (first-use via git log -S<pattern> [-- path]); jq = key presence in the tracked JSON file at path (first-use via git log -S on the final key token, scoped to path); ref = git refs matching pattern (first-use via the earliest ref-target committer date).

durable:false detections report current-state presence only and are EXCLUDED from adoption-lag and from AVAILABLE-BUT-UNUSED (card step 3): refs/karta/**/failed is rewritten by karta-deliver and git keeps no reflog for refs/karta/**.

entries.capability: Inline declared-debt markers (KARTA-DEFER) at deferral sites in tracked content
The smoke oracle type on binder work items
The delivery failure path, tracked via its durable traces: accepted refs persist post-archive (waiver/override markers in tracked content are the sibling trace)
Current-state failed-ref presence (ephemeral: karta-deliver deletes the failed ref on accept and rewrites it in revert-the-wave)
Human title + plain-language summary on binders and work items

entries.note: per-host model + effort tiers on karta's own agents/skills — plugin-internal, no consumer-repo trace

entries.capability: karta-validate design-fidelity loop (data-first comparison shipped 1.10.0); adoption trace = any tracked karta-validate mention (a committed validation report or delivery note)

entries.note: doc-gardner agent effort raise — patch, plugin-internal

entries.capability: Declared stack-pack overrides with stable rule ids (KARTA-SME-OVERRIDE markers) in tracked content

entries.note: kaizen dogfood enablement on karta itself + example-binder docs — no new consumer-repo-observable capability
plannotator optional review surface — separately-installed CLI, leaves no consumer-repo trace

entries.capability: Binder end-of-life: delivered binders archived to .karta/binders/archive/
Cross-item shared_terms declarations on binders (byte-identity enforcement)

entries.note: writer-confinement hooks + shared-terms pending detection — plugin-internal enforcement
Codex CLI compatibility certification — plugin-internal/publishing, no consumer-repo trace

entries.capability: Built-in go-naming and go-htmx stack packs (pinnable via sme[], seedable to .karta/sme/)
